item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice to create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Bacon-wrapped pork tenderloin with mustard sauce and rice, topped with parsley. With sautéed apples and onion. (6+11)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Beef phở — rice noodles with flash-fried beef in an umami-rich, spiced broth, topped with a fresh vegetable salad. With coriander, Thai basil, lime and hoisin sauce. (1+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Tofu phở — rice noodles with crispy-fried tofu in an umami-rich, spiced broth, topped with a fresh vegetable salad. With coriander, Thai basil, lime and hoisin sauce. (1+7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Teriyaki-marinated chicken, pan-fried and served with rice and a spiced coleslaw with lime, poppy seeds and curry. (3+7+8+9+15) GREEN DISH: dish Teriyaki-marinated tempeh, pan-fried and served with rice and a spiced coleslaw with lime, poppy seeds and curry. (3+7+8+9+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Fried rice with duck, chicken and plenty of vegetables. Served with a cucumber salad with sesame, chilli, roasted garlic and soy. (7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Fried rice with egg and plenty of vegetables. Served with a cucumber salad with sesame, chilli, roasted garlic and soy. (2+7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Roasted Italian-spiced chicken meatballs with Caesar potato salad and slow-roasted tomatoes, topped with grana and crispy panko tossed with parsley. Served with extra Caesar dressing and chilli sauce. (1+2+6+7+11+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Roasted Italian-spiced pea-protein meatballs with Caesar potato salad and slow-roasted tomatoes, topped with grana and crispy panko tossed with parsley. Served with extra Caesar dressing and chilli sauce. (1+6+11+13+15)
